tools.name: explain_cron
tools.description: Explain a cron expression in human-readable form and show parsed fields. Supports @presets like @daily, @weekly.

tools.name: validate_cron
tools.description: Check if a cron expression is valid. Returns {valid: bool, error?: string}.

tools.name: next_runs
tools.description: Get the next N scheduled run times for a cron expression. Uses standard Unix OR semantics for day fields.

tools.name: generate_cron
tools.description: Generate a cron expression from human-friendly options.

tools.name: diff_cron
tools.description: Compare two cron expressions and return per-field differences.

tools.name: common_crons
tools.description: List commonly used cron expressions with descriptions.
